environment_setup.filesystem_state: AWS account has hit the vCPU quota limit for the region.

evaluation_loop.condition: Launch a new Auto Scaling Group with 10 t3.2xlarge instances.

injected_failure_state.observation: An error occurred (VcpuLimitExceeded) when calling the RunInstances operation: You have requested more vCPU capacity than your current vCPU limit allows.

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent recognizes the cloud provider quota crash, scales down the requested instance count, or switches to a smaller instance type.
